    distance(String, SpatialGeometry, Number) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Returns a distance expression based on SDO_GEOM.SDO_DISTANCE using the configured default unit and a caller-provided tolerance.
    distance(String, SpatialGeometry, Number, String) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Returns a distance expression based on SDO_GEOM.SDO_DISTANCE using the supplied tolerance and unit.

    Returns the original GeoJSON payload.

    Creates a bindable geometry value using the configured default SRID.

    N

    nearestNeighbor(String, SpatialGeometry, int) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Returns an SDO_NN(...) predicate using Oracle operator id 1.
    nearestNeighborDistance() - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Returns the SDO_NN_DISTANCE(1) expression for use in select lists or order clauses after OracleSpatialJdbcOperations.nearestNeighbor(String, SpatialGeometry, int).

    O

    ON - Enum constant in enum class com.oracle.spring.spatial.SpatialRelationMask
     
    OracleSpatialAutoConfiguration - Class in com.oracle.spring.spatial
     
    OracleSpatialAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialAutoConfiguration
     
    OracleSpatialGeoJsonRowMapper - Class in com.oracle.spring.spatial
    RowMapper that reads a projected GeoJSON column from a JDBC result set.
    OracleSpatialGeoJsonRowMapper(String) - Constructor for class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialGeoJsonRowMapper
    Creates a row mapper for the given projected GeoJSON column label.
    OracleSpatialJdbcOperations - Class in com.oracle.spring.spatial
    Spring JDBC-oriented entry point for working with Oracle Spatial and GeoJSON-backed SDO_GEOMETRY values.
    OracleSpatialJdbcOperations(OracleSpatialProperties) - Constructor for class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Creates a new operations helper backed by the provided properties.
    OracleSpatialProperties - Class in com.oracle.spring.spatial
    Configuration properties for Oracle Spatial helper beans.
    OracleSpatialProperties() - Constructor for class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialProperties
     
    OSONDeserializer<T> - Class in com.oracle.spring.json.kafka
    The OSONDeserializer converts JSONB byte arrays to java objects.
    OSONDeserializer(JSONB, Class) - Constructor for class com.oracle.spring.json.kafka.OSONDeserializer
     
    OSONKafkaSerializationFactory - Class in com.oracle.spring.json.kafka
    Factory class to create OSONDeserializer and OSONSerializer instances.
    OSONKafkaSerializationFactory(JSONB) - Constructor for class com.oracle.spring.json.kafka.OSONKafkaSerializationFactory
     
    osonSerializationFactory(JSONB) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.json.JsonCollectionsAutoConfiguration
     
    OSONSerializer<T> - Class in com.oracle.spring.json.kafka
    The OSONSerializer converts java objects to a JSONB byte array.
    OSONSerializer(JSONB) - Constructor for class com.oracle.spring.json.kafka.OSONSerializer

    relate(String, SpatialGeometry, SpatialRelationMask) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Returns an SDO_RELATE(...) predicate for the given relationship mask.

    S

    selection(String) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.SpatialExpression
    Returns this expression as a select-list projection with the given alias.
    serialize(String, T) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.json.kafka.OSONSerializer
     
    setDdlAuto(String) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.json.duality.builder.DualityViewConfigurationProperties
     
    setDefaultDistanceUnit(String) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialProperties
     
    setDefaultSrid(int) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialProperties
     
    setEnabled(boolean) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialProperties
     
    setShowSql(boolean) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.json.duality.builder.DualityViewConfigurationProperties
     
    SpatialExpression - Class in com.oracle.spring.spatial
    Represents a spatial SQL expression that can be used in a select list, insert/update value expression, or order clause while still carrying any required JDBC bind values.
    SpatialGeometry - Class in com.oracle.spring.spatial
    Represents a GeoJSON value and SRID that can be bound into Oracle Spatial SQL generated by OracleSpatialJdbcOperations.
    SpatialJdbcBindable - Interface in com.oracle.spring.spatial
    Contract for spatial query parts that can apply their bind parameters to a JdbcClient.StatementSpec.
    SpatialPredicate - Class in com.oracle.spring.spatial
    Represents a spatial predicate suitable for use in a SQL WHERE clause while carrying the bind values needed by Spring JDBC.
    SpatialRelationMask - Enum Class in com.oracle.spring.spatial
    Supported Oracle Spatial relationship masks for SDO_RELATE.
    srid() - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.SpatialGeometry
    Returns the SRID associated with this geometry.

    T

    toGeoJson(String) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Returns a GeoJSON projection expression for the given geometry column.

    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class com.oracle.spring.otel.Controller.IceCreamFlavor
    Returns a string representation of this record class.

    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    W

    withinDistance(String, SpatialGeometry, Number) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Returns an SDO_WITHIN_DISTANCE(...) predicate using the configured default distance unit.
    withinDistance(String, SpatialGeometry, Number, String) - Method in class com.oracle.spring.spatial.OracleSpatialJdbcOperations
    Returns an SDO_WITHIN_DISTANCE(...) predicate using the supplied distance unit token.
